//Project 1 Insights
Distribution of Prices
Most listings are below $500. A few luxury listings push the average higher.

Average Price by Neighbourhood Group
Manhattan has the highest average price, followed by Brooklyn, Queens

Room Type vs Number of Listings
Most listings are for Entire Home/Apartments. Private rooms are the next most common, and shared rooms are rare.

//Project 2 Insights
Survival Count by Gender
More women survived over the men

Age Distribution of Survivors
1st class passengers survived more than 2nd and 3rd class

Age Distribution of Survivors
The younger half of the passengers (40 and below) survived more compared to the older passengers
